# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.SlidingWindow&lt;T&gt;

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

Fixed-size circular buffer for sliding window operations. Mutable for performance; use Clone() for checkpointing.
